items.scenario: You recently signed up for a weekend ceramics workshop at a community arts center. The confirmation email listed a start time that conflicts with the schedule posted on the center's website, and you are unsure which one is correct. You want to sort this out before Saturday.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Prentice. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the conflicting start times you received
Request a written confirmation before the weekend
items.subject: Confirming the start time for Saturday's ceramics workshop

items.scenario: You are a second-year student enrolled in an introductory statistics course. The lab section you were assigned meets at the same time as a required seminar, and you would like to move to a different lab section that still has open seats on Wednesday afternoons.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Nakamura. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why the current lab section does not work
Ask whether the Wednesday section still has space
Request help completing the section change
items.subject: Request to move to the Wednesday lab section

items.scenario: You volunteer with a neighborhood after-school reading program that recently moved to a smaller room. Several children now have nowhere to sit during the busiest sessions, and a few parents have raised concerns. You want to bring this to the coordinator's attention and help find a solution.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Abernathy. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the seating problem in the new room
Explain how it is affecting the children
Offer to help arrange a larger space
items.subject: Seating shortage at the after-school reading sessions

items.scenario: You recently began a summer internship at an environmental consulting firm. Your supervisor mentioned that interns can shadow the field survey team, but no one has explained how to sign up or which dates are available. You are eager to take part before the season ends.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Castellano. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain your interest in the field survey work
Ask how to sign up and which dates remain
Thank your supervisor for the opportunity
items.subject: Joining the field survey team this summer
